channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: DMK Minister KR Periakaruppan Loses Tiruppattur Seat by One Vote in Tamil Nadu Elections
item.description: In a remarkable demonstration of how every vote can make a difference, senior DMK leader and Tamil Nadu minister for co-operatives, KR Periakaruppan, lost the Tiruppattur Assembly seat by a single vot...

item.title: Delivery Rider Caught Stealing Items from Nairobi Shop on CCTV
item.description: In Nairobi, a delivery rider was caught on CCTV committing theft while collecting a parcel from a local shop. The footage shows the man wearing a reflective jacket, walking in confidently, and engagin...

item.title: Awoniyi Shines with Two Goals as Nottingham Forest Beat Chelsea, Talks Resilience on the Bench
item.description: Naija striker Taiwo Awoniyi don show say him still dey sharp as ever after e score two goals wey carry Nottingham Forest waka pass Chelsea 3-1 for Stamford Bridge. Dis match na him 100th appearance fo...

item.title: Kenya and Tanzania Strengthen Ties with Trade, Energy, and Infrastructure Deals
item.description: During his two-day state visit to Dar es Salaam, President William Ruto of Kenya emphasised the deep-rooted interdependence between Kenya and Tanzania. He noted that the two countries share history, c...

item.title: Twelve People Die in Two Road Crashes in Eastern Cape
item.description: In the span of just 24 hours, twelve lives were tragically lost in two separate traffic accidents in the Eastern Cape. The first incident involved a collision between a bus and a minibus taxi in Karie...

item.title: Highlights from Met Gala 2026: Red Carpet Fashion and Afterparty Looks
item.description: The 2026 Met Gala, held at New York's Metropolitan Museum of Art, saw celebrities showcase a mix of bold fashion statements and afterparty transformations. Kim Kardashian and Beyoncé were widely celeb...

item.title: Asia grapples with costly energy crisis triggered by Iran conflict
item.description: Governments across Asia are working hard to manage the energy crisis sparked by the Iran war. As the top oil importing region, Asia has seen major disruptions with oil imports dropping sharply by 30 p...

item.title: DepEd, local officials boost heat and safety measures ahead of 2026 Palarong Pambansa
item.description: The Department of Education (DepEd), together with the provincial government of Agusan del Sur, is strengthening health and safety measures for the 2026 Palarong Pambansa, set to open on May 24 in Pro...

item.title: Government Withholds Consultation Report on Lawful Access Reform as Bill C-22 Advances
item.description: The Liberal government, under Public Safety Minister Gary Anandasangaree, has opted not to release a report that informed its revised legislation granting police and security agencies expanded powers ...

item.title: Telus service disrupted in northern B.C. due to copper theft
item.description: A significant Telus service outage affected northern British Columbia after copper thefts were discovered. The stolen cables caused disruptions to phone and internet services for both residential and ...

item.title: Premier1 prepares maiden drilling at Rochefort gold prospect in WA
item.description: Premier1 is gearing up for a reverse circulation drilling program at Rochefort, an untested gold prospect within the Abbotts North project in Western Australia's Murchison region, about 35 kilometres ...

item.title: Creatine: Its Role in Energy Production, Muscle Performance, and Potential Brain Health Benefits
item.description: Creatine, a compound naturally produced in the liver, kidneys, and pancreas from amino acids, plays a vital role in cellular energy by helping regenerate ATP through phosphocreatine. Primarily stored ...

item.title: Rising Petrol Prices in Abuja Force Residents to Shift from Private Cars to Public Transport
item.description: As petrol prices continue to rise for Nigeria, many people wey dey Abuja don dey rethink how dem dey waka for town. For plenty residents, owning car don turn wahala instead of convenience because fuel...

item.title: Rahul Gandhi urges political unity after BJP wins West Bengal elections
item.description: In the wake of the 2026 West Bengal assembly elections, Congress leader Rahul Gandhi has appealed to his party colleagues and other opposition leaders to refrain from celebrating the Trinamool Congres...

item.title: NASENI Brings Nigerian-Made Clean Energy Solutions to Kano Households and SMEs
item.description: For Kano, NASENI don start serious clean energy programme wey go better life for plenty households and small businesses. On 28th April 2026, dem launch the Sustainable Empowerment Programme wey distri...

item.title: Nine miners lose lives in coal mine explosion in Sutatausa, Colombia
item.description: On May 4, 2026, a tragic accident occurred at a coal mine in Sutatausa, located in the Cundinamarca department of central Colombia. According to the National Mining Agency, the explosion was caused du...

item.title: Overview of Victoria’s 2026-27 State Budget Announced by Treasurer Jaclyn Symes
item.description: The Victorian Treasurer, Jaclyn Symes, has unveiled the state budget for 2026-27, detailing the Allan government’s planned expenditure across multiple sectors. The budget outlines allocations for heal...

item.title: Tanzania allocates Sh525 billion for AFCON 2027 infrastructure and preparations
item.description: Tanzania government don propose Sh525.3 billion budget for the Ministry of Information, Culture, Arts and Sports for 2026/27 financial year, mainly to develop projects for AFCON 2027. Minister Paul Ma...

item.title: Fact Check: Duterte Standee at World Summit Post is Fake
item.description: A social media post claimed that a standee of former Philippine President Rodrigo Duterte was seen at the Former World Leader Summit in the Republic of Biringan. The post, which has been widely shared...

item.title: Communications Authority Releases Draft Guidelines to Standardise Telecom Cable Installations and Maintenance
item.description: The Communications Authority of Kenya (CA) has invited the public and stakeholders to give their views on new proposed rules that will bring order to how internet companies install and maintain cable ...
